content:
# Key Concept
- All cards are organized in a specific order.
- You can see which card your opponent has selected and played from their hand.
- Your opponent's hand is mirrored to yours.

# Card Order
The images below shows the card order, 1 being the leftmost card.
Your leftmost awaker will have their cards on the leftmost side and posse will be on the rightmost side.
Awaker cards are also in order, Strike will be the leftmost card for that awaker. 

# Video Demo
The video is edited to show the opponent's hand, so you can see how their card selection and play are perfectly mirrored.

# Usage
With this technique, you can derive a lot information about your opponent's hand. For example, in the demo video, I can tell my opponent does not have any Caecus cards because they played Wheel and the card next to it is Murphy's. If they had any Caecus card it would be next to the Wheel and not Murphy's.
There are posse and awakers which requires information on your opponent's hand for example Goliath posse, Clementine and Sanga.
thread_title: Reading Your Opponent's Hand in Traphase
